steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The strongest signal is the dramatic numerical disparity: 221,000 islands under one definition versus 24 under another. This stark difference reveals that the choice of definition fundamentally determines what gets counted.

steps.title: Match the definition's impact
steps.content:
D makes the key generalization directly—different definitions produce huge disparities—and supports it with Sweden's dramatic shift from 221,000 to 24.

The others either present limited information or fail to emphasize how significantly definition affects the count.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
